---
title: "Sort_Excel_files"
output: html_document
date: '2025-02-03'
---


```{r}
library(readxl)    # For reading Excel files
library(writexl)   # For writing Excel files
library(dplyr)     # For data manipulation
```


## Corrected or Uncorrected data
```{r}
#input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels'
input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels_CORRECTED/'
```


## Read mixed models results
```{r}
split_string <- "_MixedModel"

xlsx_files <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names=T)
```


```{r}
sort_sheet <- function(input_file) {
  sheets <- excel_sheets(input_file)

  # Read, sort, and store sheets in a list
  sorted_sheets <- lapply(sheets, function(sheet) {
    df <- read_excel(input_file, sheet = sheet)  # Read sheet
    if ("t.value" %in% colnames(df)) {           # Check if column exists
      df <- df %>% arrange(p.value)              # Sort by t.value
    }
    return(df)  # Return sorted dataframe
  })
  names(sorted_sheets) <- sheets
  return(sorted_sheets)
}
```

```{r}
sorted_sheets <- lapply(xlsx_files, function(file) {
  sorted_excel <- sort_sheet(file)
  write_xlsx(sorted_excel, file)
})
  
```
